overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a drive along a foggy elevated highway at night, transitioning to walking through a hillside shantytown with makeshift structures, and concluding at an elevated overlook with views of the neon-lit city skyline. The atmosphere is dark and moody with artificial lighting cutting through heavy fog.

events.description: passing under a concrete overpass structure
vehicle slows and exits highway onto off-ramp

agents.ego_description: driving a vehicle along a foggy elevated highway, navigating past streetlights and approaching a large digital billboard

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines
solid concrete safety barrier along the right edge
tall poles with bright overhead lights illuminating the fog
large concrete highway overpass crossing above the road
large illuminated advertisement screen visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Driving along a foggy elevated highway at night, illuminated by streetlights cutting through the haze. The road passes under concrete overpasses while a large digital billboard glows in the distance. The environment is devoid of pedestrians with only sparse traffic visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside shantytown with makeshift corrugated metal structures

events.description: exits vehicle and enters muddy shantytown area with abandoned cars
path narrows between tightly packed corrugated metal buildings with warm light from windows

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow muddy paths between makeshift shanty buildings, navigating uphill through debris

entered.detail: makeshift dwellings constructed from rusted corrugated metal sheets
derelict cars partially buried in mud along the path
uneven dirt ground with puddles and debris
wooden stairs built into the hillside between structures
steep upward slope with scattered shanty buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense hillside shantytown constructed from corrugated metal and scrap materials. The ground is muddy and uneven, with abandoned vehicles and debris scattered along the narrow paths. Warm light glows from windows as the route winds uphill between makeshift structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation walkway overlooking city skyline

events.description: emerging from shantytown onto elevated concrete walkway with panoramic city view
city skyline becomes visible through fog with neon lights and distant towers

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway approaching a figure standing at the railing overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: standing at the railing looking out at the illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: elevated paved path with metal railings
safety barrier along the edge of the overlook
dense cluster of skyscrapers and towers visible through fog
tall buildings illuminated with bright neon lights

segments.scene_description: Reaching an elevated walkway that opens to a panoramic view of the foggy city skyline. Neon lights from distant towers pierce through the haze. A lone figure stands at the railing overlooking the illuminated urban sprawl, while the camera approaches along the concrete path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a desolate, foggy highway into the heart of a hillside shantytown, eventually opening onto a panoramic city overlook. It begins with a drive along an elevated road at night, where streetlights and a distant digital billboard pierce through a thick haze beneath concrete overpasses. As the movement shifts from the road to a pedestrian pace, the environment transforms into a dense hillside settlement of corrugated metal and scrap, winding uphill through muddy paths littered with debris and warm window light. The scene then expands as the path leads onto an elevated concrete walkway, where the cramped structures give way to a vast, open vista. Finally, the camera approaches a lone figure at a railing, revealing a sprawling urban skyline where neon lights from distant towers cut through the lingering fog.
